[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100010 2
1 00001010 2
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000101 2
7 11000011 4

01 10 00000001 1
12 21 11000010 3
23 32 10000010 2
34 43 00000001 1
45 54 01000000 1
56 65 00100000 1
67 76 00000010 1
70 07 00000000 a match 2 3 4 5

02 20 00000000 a match 2 3 4 5
13 31 10000011 3
24 42 01000000 1
35 53 10000000 1
46 64 00000001 1
57 75 01000000 1
60 06 00000001 1
71 17 01000010 2

03 30 00000101 2 match 6
14 41 01000001 2
25 52 11100000 3
36 63 00000011 2
47 74 01000000 1
50 05 00000000 a match 2 3 4 5
61 16 00000011 2
72 27 01000010 2

04 40 00000001 1
15 51 11000000 2
26 62 00100010 2 match 0
37 73 00001010 2 match 1
